productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Purple Cap
description: This cap from united colors of benetton makes a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Designed to offer snug comfort, this cap is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks.Made of 90% cotton and 10% acrylic Nearly seamless stitching for abrasion-free comfortRibbed hem for style and comfortBobble on the top for enhanced style CareHand wash in warm water and line dryDo not dry clean, bleach, wring Cool iron
